commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `@clawsweeper visualize` parsing, assist workflow mode/lens dispatch, marker-backed visual comments, visual self-noise filtering, glyph guidance, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the P3 review finding: source inspection at the PR head shows the new visualize command path exists while the supported-command help text still omits it. The main feature also has live proof through a successful assist workflow run and current marker-backed visual comment.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can update command help/docs without deciding the broader visual-brief product scope.

target.title: feat: add visualize commands
target.body:
## Summary
- add @clawsweeper visualize command parsing and dispatch through the read-only assist lane
- generate marker-backed visual brief comments that update in place by item/lens/head
- filter ClawSweeper visual comments out of later review context
- document standard glyph meanings for visual briefs and when to use them

Refs https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/202

Note: this is a command/comment slice and intentionally does not claim to close the full issue 202 review-hint acceptance matrix.

## ClawSweeper follow-up
- fixed visual footer ordering so metadata appears before the generated brief and the maintainer ruling footer remains final
- fixed workflow_dispatch fallback so manual mode/lens inputs are honored
- tightened unknown value handling for type-aware lint
- added explicit visual glyph guidance for expected, broken, risk, bug path, trust boundary, disk, runtime, and maintainer judgment markers

## Real behavior proof
- Ran the real assist workflow on this PR branch with mode=visual and lens=state at current head 7e924b66922a3f50d404cd46d155ee487ceb69b7: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/actions/runs/26430248898
- The workflow posted a marker-backed visual comment for PR 204 at that head: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/pull/204#issuecomment-4539684232
- The visual output includes glyph usage and a legend where useful.

## Validation
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json --pretty false
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.repair.json --pretty false
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.dashboard.json --pretty false
- node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check .github/workflows/assist.yml src/clawsweeper.ts src/repair/comment-router-core.ts src/repair/comment-router.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts
- node --test test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts --test-name-pattern visualize
- node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts --test-name-pattern "review context comment filter"
- node_modules/.bin/oxlint src --ignore-pattern "src/repair/**" --tsconfig tsconfig.json --type-aware --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives -D correctness
target.author: takhoffman

commands.command: visualize state │ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ no visual command state │ │ assist lane only │ │ no visual lens propagation │ │ no marker-backed visual brief │ └──────────────────────────────┘ ``` ```text proposed by pr @clawsweeper visualize state │ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ parse intent=visualize │ │ visual_lens=state │ └──────────────┬───────────────┘ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ dispatch assist.yml │ │ mode=visual │ │ lens=state │ └──────────────┬───────────────┘ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ build visual prompt │ │ read-only advisory contract │ │ required maintainer footer │ └──────────────┬───────────────┘ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ create/update visual comment │ │ marker item/lens/head │ └──────────────────────────────┘ ``` ```text state checklist [+] command state added for visualize [+] lens state added for ux/flow/state/data/proof/risk/maintainer/auto [+] workflow input state added for mode + lens [+] self-noise state filters prior visual comments [?] real github behavior proof not supplied in context [?] maintainer judgment still needed on automation/comment semantics ``` remaining risk: the changed surface is automation-facing. the supplied context shows focused tests and type/format commands, but the recorded clawsweeper review still says real behavior proof is needed: a visualize command should be shown creating or updating a redacted github comment at the current head. ## maintainer ruling benefit: risk: proof needed: recommended next action: question presented:
commands.freeform_prompt: visualize state │ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ No visual command state │ │ Assist lane only │ │ No visual lens propagation │ │ No marker-backed visual brief │ └──────────────────────────────┘ ``` ```text PROPOSED BY PR @clawsweeper visualize state │ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ parse intent=visualize │ │ visual_lens=state │ └──────────────┬───────────────┘ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ dispatch assist.yml │ │ mode=visual │ │ lens=state │ └──────────────┬───────────────┘ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ build visual prompt │ │ read-only advisory contract │ │ required maintainer footer │ └──────────────┬───────────────┘ v ┌──────────────────────────────┐ │ create/update visual comment │ │ marker item/lens/head │ └──────────────────────────────┘ ``` ```text State checklist [+] Command state added for visualize [+] Lens state added for ux/flow/state/data/proof/risk/maintainer/auto [+] Workflow input state added for mode + lens [+] Self-noise state filters prior visual comments [?] Real GitHub behavior proof not supplied in context [?] Maintainer judgment still needed on automation/comment semantics ``` Remaining risk: the changed surface is automation-facing. The supplied context shows focused tests and type/format commands, but the recorded ClawSweeper review still says real behavior proof is needed: a visualize command should be shown creating or updating a redacted GitHub comment at the current head. ## Maintainer ruling Benefit: Risk: Proof needed: Recommended next action: Question presented:
